title: angraecum capense
intro: Angraecum capense, also known as the Cape angraecum, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Angraecum capense are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to extract its medicinal properties.
